zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas White於1699年出生在美國紐約州紐約市昆斯朗 易曼德 希迪時，他的父親John White Jr.45歲，母親Elizabeth Dyer72歲。他於1716年4月2日與Hannah Curtice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1749年4月26日在美國紐約州素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德謝爾特 易曼德享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas White于1699年出生在美国纽约州紐約市昆斯朗 易曼德 希迪时，他的父亲John White Jr.45岁，母亲Elizabeth Dyer72岁。他于1716年4月2日与Hannah Curtice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1749年4月26日在美国纽约州素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德謝爾特 易曼德享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: White
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Whitty
meanings: topographic name denoting a ‘dweller by the white hedge or the white (forest) enclosure’, from Middle English whit ‘white’ (Old English hwīt) + heie ‘hedge, enclosure’ (Old English (ge)hæg and Old French haie) perhaps in reference to whitethorn (hawthorn) hedging. This English name has been recorded in Ireland (Wexford) since the 13th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Faoite, see also White .
nickname from Middle English whit ‘white’ + eie ‘eye’ (Old English hwīt + ēage). Compare Blackie 2 and Greeney .
variant of   Witty  , with which this surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Whitson
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Whiteson, literally ‘white son’ or perhaps ‘son of someone named White ’. Occasionally, a variant of Whiston .

variants.name: Whitt
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of   White  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Witt  .

variants.name: McQuitty
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhaoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelicization of English White . See also McWhite .

variants.name: Whitecotton
meanings: Apparently a compound of   White   +   Cotton  , but the history is obscure.

variants.name: McElwain
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Bháin (Irish) or Mac Gille Bháin (Scottish) ‘son of the fair-haired lad’, often translated into English as White or Whyte but otherwise indistinguishable, once Anglicized, from Scottish Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain in 2 below. Compare Kilbane .
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Beathan’, a personal name representing a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare McBain .

variants.name: McWhite
meanings: Irish: partly translated Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Faoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of English White .

variants.name: Wight
meanings: Scottish and English: nickname from Middle English wiht, wight ‘agile, nimble, strong, brave’ (Old Norse víg with the Old Norse neuter suffix -t, for which compare the word scant), or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht. Possibly sometimes a nickname from Middle English wight ‘living creature; small portion or thing’, or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht.

English: habitational name from the Isle of Wight. The island is recorded as Vectis (its Latin name) c. 150 AD . Its name derives from a British word, perhaps related to Welsh gwaith ‘turn, course’, meaning ‘place of the division’, in reference to the island's position in the Solent.
English and Scottish: variant of   White  .

variants.name: Whites
meanings: English: variant of White with genitive or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Whitman
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Whytman (Old English Hwītmann, from hwīt ‘white’ + mann ‘man’). Compare White 1 and also Wightman , with which this surname was probably confused.
History: John Whitman settled in Weymouth, MA, c. 1638. The poet Walt Whitman (1819–92) was descended from Joseph Whitman, who had settled in Stratford, CT, from England around 1660.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas White was born in 1699, in Long Island City, Queens, New York City, New York, United States, his father, John White Jr., was 45 and his mother, Elizabeth Dyer, was 72. He married Hannah Curtice on 2 April 1716, in Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 26 April 1749, in Shelter Island, Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, United States, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas White est né en 1699, à Long Island City, Queens, New York City, New York, États-Unis, son père, John White Jr., avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Dyer, avait 72 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Curtice le 2 avril 1716, à Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1749, à Shelter Island, Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas White 1699 in Long Island City, Queens, New York City, New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John White Jr. 45 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Dyer 72. Er hat am 2. April 1716 in Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Curtice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 26. April 1749 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Shelter Island, Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイ
ja.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Briti: アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州スフォルクシェルター イスランド
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Whiteが1699年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイクイーンスロング イスランド シトイで生まれた時，父John White Jr.は45歳，母Elizabeth Dyerは72歳であった。1716年4月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクシェルター イスランドでHannah Curticeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1749年4月26日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州スフォルクシェルター イスランドシェルター イスランドで50歳で死去した。

ko.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드
ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York, British Ame: 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 소우토드 소우토드
ko.Long Island, New York, British Colonial: 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 퀸스 론그 이슬랜드 시티
ko.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Briti: 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드 셸터 이슬랜드
미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티
ko.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Briti: 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas White(이)가 1699년 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 퀸스 론그 이슬랜드 시티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John White Jr.(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Dyer(은)는 72세였다. 그는 1716년 4월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드에서 Hannah Curtice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1749년 4월 26일 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드 셸터 이슬랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Briti: Shelter Island, Suffolk, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas White nasceu em 1699, em Long Island City, Queens, New York City, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John White Jr., tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Dyer, tinha 72 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Curtice em 2 de abril de 1716, em Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1749, em Shelter Island, Shelter Island, Suffolk, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas White родился в 1699 г. в местности лонг исланд сити, куинс, Нью-Йорк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John White Jr. было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Dyer, 72. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Curtice 2 апреля 1716 г. в местности шелтир исланд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 26 апреля 1749 г. в местности шелтир исланд, шелтир исланд, суффолк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas White nació en 1699, en Long Island City, Queens, Nueva York, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, John White Jr., tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Dyer, tenía 72 años. Se casó con Hannah Curtice el 2 de abril de 1716, en Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 26 de abril de 1749, en Shelter Island, Shelter Island, Suffolk, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 50 años.
